title: Walk-in Drive Teacher at Lido Learning International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Teacher at Lido Learning International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Join the Lido Learning International Enterprises family as a Teacher in Nagpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Lido Learning International Enterprises:
Lido Learning International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lido Learning International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
